---
title: "nnodely – neuralize your model"
author:
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
  - "Alice Plebe"
  - "Mojtaba Sharifzadeh"
  - "Mattia Piazza"
  - "Sebastiano Taddei"
  - "Giovanni Scialla"
  - "Francesco Baroni"
  - "Davide De Martini"
  - "Giovanni Maria Francesco La Scala"
  - "Gioele Defrancesco"
  - "Filippo Faccini"
publication: "ICRA 2026 — Late breaking results (2026)"
type: poster
categories:
  - "Posters"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "ICRA 2026 — Late breaking results"
venue: "ICRA 2026 — Late breaking results"
year: 2026
doi: ""
poster_pdf: poster.pdf
article_pdf: paper.pdf
pub_number: 52
order: -52
image: poster.png
---

::: {.poster-preview}
![](poster.png){fig-alt="Poster: nnodely – neuralize your model" width=95%}
:::
